name: Aventurine
desc: A high-ranking executive of the IPC's Strategic Investment Department.\nA risk-taker, his constant smile makes it difficult for people to discern his true feelings.

1.name: Prisoner's Dilemma
1.desc: Increases CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for ally targets with Fortified Wager. After using the Ultimate, provides all allies with a Fortified Wager shield, whose Shield Effect is equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the one provided by the Skill, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

2.name: Bounded Rationality
2.desc: When using the Basic ATK, reduces the target's All-Type RES by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Droprate Maxing
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Unexpected Hanging Paradox
4.desc: When triggering his Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, first increases Aventurine's DEF by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s), and additionally increases the Hits Per Action for his talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

5.name: Ambiguity Aversion
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Stag Hunt Game
6.desc: For every teammate that holds a Shield, the DMG dealt by Aventurine increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, up to a maximum of <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

130401.name: Straight Bet
130401.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Aventurine's DEF to one designated enemy target.
130401.simple_desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated enemy target.

130402.name: Cornerstone Deluxe
130402.desc: Provides all allies with a Fortified Wager shield that can block DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Aventurine's DEF plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). When Fortified Wager is gained repeatedly, the Shield Effect can stack, up to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of the current Shield Effect provided by the Skill.
130402.simple_desc: Provides all allies with a Fortified Wager shield, <color=#f29e38ff>whose Shield Effect is stackable</color>.

130403.name: Roulette Shark
130403.desc: Randomly gains 1 to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> points of "Blind Bet." Then, inflicts "Unnerved" on one designated enemy target for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Aventurine's DEF to that enemy target. When an ally hits an "Unnerved" enemy target, the CRIT DMG dealt increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>.
130403.simple_desc: Gains a random amount of "Blind Bet" points and inflicts "Unnerved "on one enemy, dealing Imaginary DMG. When an ally target hits an "Unnerved" enemy, <color=#f29e38ff>the CRIT DMG dealt increases</color>.

130404.name: Shot Loaded Right
130404.desc: For any single ally with "Fortified Wager," their Effect RES increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>, and when they get attacked, Aventurine gains 1 point of "Blind Bet." When Aventurine has "Fortified Wager," he can resist <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>. This effect can trigger again after <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Aventurine additionally gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Blind Bet" after getting attacked. Upon reaching 7 points of "Blind Bet," Aventurine consumes the 7 points to launch a <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>-hit <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, with each hit dealing Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Aventurine's DEF to one random enemy. "Blind Bet" is capped at <unbreak>10</unbreak> points.
130404.simple_desc: For any single ally with "Fortified Wager," their Effect RES increases, and when they get attacked, Aventurine accumulates "Blind Bet." When Aventurine has "Fortified Wager," he can resist <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>. Upon reaching 7 points of "Blind Bet," Aventurine consumes the 7 points to launch a <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> that deals minor Imaginary DMG to random single enemy targets, bouncing a total of 7 times.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000011.name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominance, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock, Happiness Puppet, Grudge Ablaze.

130406.name: Attack
130406.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

130407.name: The Red or the Black
130407.desc:
After using the Technique, 1 of the following effects will be granted:
There is a chance for DEF to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
There is a high chance for DEF to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.
There is a small chance for DEF to increase by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

When this Technique is used repeatedly, the acquired effect with the highest buff value is retained.
When the next battle starts, increases all allies' DEF by the corresponding value, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
130407.simple_desc: Using the Technique randomly grants one out of the three DEF Boost effects with different buff values. After entering the next battle, increases all allies' DEF by the corresponding value.

1.point_desc: For every <unbreak>100</unbreak> of Aventurine's DEF that exceeds <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>, increases his own CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, up to a maximum increase of <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

When battle starts, grants all allies a Fortified Wager shield, whose Shield Effect is equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the one provided by the Skill, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

After a teammate with "Fortified Wager" launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, Aventurine accumulates 1 "Blind Bet" point. This effect can trigger up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s). Its trigger count resets at the start of Aventurine's turn. After Aventurine launches his Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, provides all ally targets with a "Fortified Wager" that can offset DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Aventurine's DEF plus <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>, and additionally grants a "Fortified Wager" that can block DMG equal to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of Aventurine's DEF plus <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> to the ally with the lowest Shield Effect, lasting for 3 turns.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.
